title: Playground
subtitle: Admin direct chat test against a chosen channel and model (no quota, bypasses routing).

config.title: Settings
config.noModelsHint: This channel has no models yet. Run "Fetch models" on the Channels page first, or type a model name below.
config.systemPlaceholder: Optional: set a system prompt; it is prepended to the history on send.

input.placeholder: Type a message. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline. Paste images or add an image URL.
input.imageUrlPlaceholder: Paste an image URL (http or data:)
input.imageUrlInvalid: Invalid image URL — must start with http(s):// or data:.

status.empty: Select a channel and model to start chatting.

errors.noModel: Please select or enter a model name.
errors.emptyMessage: Please enter a message or attach an image.
errors.imageTooLarge: Image too large, please use one smaller than {{max}}.
